buildCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" cargo test --manifest-path tests-public/Cargo.toml --target-dir "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" --no-run
publicTestCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" cargo test --manifest-path tests-public/Cargo.toml --target-dir "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" -- --nocapture
hiddenTestCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" cargo test --manifest-path tests-hidden/Cargo.toml --target-dir "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" -- --nocapture
adversarialTestCommand: mkdir -p "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" && source ~/.cargo/env >/dev/null 2>&1 && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable CARGO_HOME="$BENCHMARK_CARGO_HOME" cargo test --manifest-path tests-adversarial/Cargo.toml --target-dir "$BENCHMARK_CARGO_TARGET_DIR" -- --nocapture
